# Optional dependencies for additional baseline forecasting models.
#
# Install with:   pip install -r requirements-optional.txt
#
# These are NOT required for the core PINN-SUEIHCDR pipeline. They are only
# needed if you want the Prophet column populated in the comparison tables
# generated by covid_pinn.master_loader / covid_pinn.stats_summary.
#
# Note: prophet pulls in cmdstanpy and a Stan toolchain; install can take
# several minutes and may require a working C++ compiler on the host.

prophet==1.1.5
